notes: H4 records the stale certification/count claims that remained after H3 and H4S.
The staged truth is 59 total personas across 10 departments with 34 active / registry-backed and 25 planned / contract-only personas.
Department certification targets now reconcile to the rebased H4S pack workflow counts and department totals.
Deterministic replay is certified by the verification artifact hash for the staged H4 count model.
title: M365 Authoritative Persona Certification Count Rebase v1
